title: Flaky Zesty Argentinian Solo-Dinner Bread
description: A low-carb-friendly, double-rise bread recipe with a tangy twist from Argentina, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Combine warm water, sugar, and yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Let the mixture sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
Add flour, salt, and olive oil to the bowl, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape into a round loaf.
Place the loaf in a greased terracotta dish and let rise for another 30 minutes.
Bake the bread for 25 minutes until golden brown.
Brush the top with red pepper paste and parsley.
Let the bread cool for 10 minutes before serving.
